name: config-sync materializes real options data for checkov, semgrep, and trivy (the formerly unprojectable tools)
command: ok=1; for t in checkov semgrep trivy; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --rule-id "r-$t" --enforced-by "$t" --json 2>/dev/null | node -e 'let s="";const t=process.argv[1];process.stdin.on("data",c=>s+=c);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const j=JSON.parse(s);const o=(Object.values(j)[0].options||{})[t];process.exit(o&&Object.keys(o).length>0?0:1)})' "$t" || ok=0; done; [ "$ok" -eq 1 ] && echo gap-tools-materialize 1>&2
